author: Jetties
text:
config: per-event participant policy with layered resolution

Add the SPEC §11 schema for opting plugins in to per-event failure
policy, and the resolver that layers state-branch -> local -> per-
invocation overrides. Legacy configs without the new `participant`
block fall through the `sync_on_change` mapping unchanged.

PluginEntry gains an optional `participant.subscriptions` map keyed
on lifecycle Event with a policy enum (required, best-effort,
gating). LocalConfig gains a `plugins` map of LocalPluginEntry so a
clone can override a single plugin's per-event policy without
touching the state branch.

LegacyPluginParticipant builds its subscription set and per-event
failure policy from `effective_subscriptions`, the seam bl-2bf7 will
plumb the local + invocation layers through. `failure_policy` now
reflects the resolved map; unmodified configs still observe
BestEffort everywhere (SPEC §12 byte-identical contract).
